title: fraxinus lingelsheimii
intro: Fraxinus lingelsheimii, also known as the Korean ash, is a deciduous tree native to China and Korea. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant. The health benefits of Fraxinus lingelsheimii include its potential to reduce the risk of heart disease, improve cognitive function, and support immune system function. Fraxinus lingelsheimii can be prepared as an herbal tea, capsule, or extract, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
